scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:js && pnpm run format
scripts.release: pnpm run validate:i18n && pnpm run build
scripts.generate:openapi:kyc: rm -rf src/services/api/kyc && openapi-generator-cli generate -i https://dev.weareuncapped.com/api/kyc/api-docs/schema -g typescript-fetch -o src/services/api/kyc --additional-properties=typescriptThreePlus=true --global-property skipFormModel=false
scripts.generate:openapi:organisation-users: rm -rf src/services/api/organisation-users && openapi-generator-cli generate -i https://dev.weareuncapped.com/api/organisation-users/api-docs/schema -g typescript-fetch -o src/services/api/organisation-users --additional-properties=typescriptThreePlus=true
scripts.generate:openapi:connections: rm -rf src/services/api/connections && openapi-generator-cli generate -i https://dev.weareuncapped.com/api/connections/api-docs/schema -g typescript-fetch -o src/services/api/connections --additional-properties=typescriptThreePlus=true
scripts.generate:openapi:loan-operations: rm -rf src/services/api/loan-operations && openapi-generator-cli generate -i https://dev.weareuncapped.com/api/loan-operations/api-docs/schema -g typescript-fetch -o src/services/api/loan-operations --additional-properties=typescriptThreePlus=true
scripts.generate:openapi:agreements: rm -rf src/services/api/agreements && openapi-generator-cli generate -i https://dev.weareuncapped.com/api/agreements/api-docs/schema -g typescript-fetch -o src/services/api/agreements --additional-properties=typescriptThreePlus=true
scripts.generate:openapi:collections: rm -rf src/services/api/collections && openapi-generator-cli generate -i https://dev.weareuncapped.com/api/collections/api-docs/schema -g typescript-fetch -o src/services/api/collections --additional-properties=typescriptThreePlus=true
scripts.generate:openapi:partners: curl -s 'https://admin:Unc44p3dP4rtn3rsh1p@dev.weareuncapped.com/api/partners/api-docs/schema' -o /tmp/partners-schema.json && rm -rf src/services/api/partners && openapi-generator-cli generate -i /tmp/partners-schema.json -g typescript-fetch -o src/services/api/partners --additional-properties=typescriptThreePlus=true
scripts.generate:openapi:hubspot: rm -rf src/services/api/hubspot && openapi-generator-cli generate -i https://dev.weareuncapped.com/api/hubspot/api-docs/schema -g typescript-fetch -o src/services/api/hubspot --additional-properties=typescriptThreePlus=true
scripts.generate:openapi:underwriting: rm -rf src/services/api/underwriting && openapi-generator-cli generate -i https://dev.weareuncapped.com/api/underwriting/api-docs/schema -g typescript-fetch -o src/services/api/underwriting --additional-properties=typescriptThreePlus=true
scripts.generate:openapi:amazon-gateway: rm -rf src/services/api/amazon-gateway && openapi-generator-cli generate -i https://dev.weareuncapped.com/api/amazon-gateway/api-docs/schema -g typescript-fetch -o src/services/api/amazon-gateway --additional-properties=typescriptThreePlus=true --global-property skipFormModel=false --skip-validate-spec
scripts.generate:openapi:reengagement: rm -rf src/services/api/reengagement && openapi-generator-cli generate -i https://dev.weareuncapped.com/api/reengagement/api-docs/schema -g typescript-fetch -o src/services/api/reengagement
